quote: asserted by nukopoli (aynu-corpora Discord, 2024) <Ref k="aynucorporadiscord" paren />
issue: The claim about Soviet minority-language orthographic policy is presented as unmarked consensus but supported only by a Discord attribution, which is a weak source for a historical policy claim.
suggestion: Either add an epistemic tag such as ‹speculative› or replace the Discord citation with a scholarly source on Soviet orthographic policy.

quote: Coda consonants (small kana appended to the syllable kana)
issue: The table header says 'small kana' but the row for -n uses full-size ン (with a note explaining that a dedicated small ン exists but has limited font support). This creates a contradiction between the header and the actual content.
suggestion: Revise the header to read 'Coda consonants (small kana appended to the syllable kana; -n uses full-size ン due to font limitations)' or move the exception into a footnote.
